title: centaurea ultreiae
intro: Centaurea ultreiae, also known as Mountain Bluet, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Centaurea ultreiae can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal supplements to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
